response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong TypeScript and cloud infrastructure skills, he falls significantly short of the requirement for 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions. His exposure to AI, agentic workflows, and MCP appears very recent, and he lacks essential experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level engineering experience with deep expertise in TypeScript and Node.js.
Recent, highly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and agentic workflows.
Solid background in cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD).
concerns: Significantly lacks the required 8+ years of experience specifically developing production-grade AI solutions.
No mention of Python experience, which is a primary required programming language for this role.
Missing core GenAI architectural experience, specifically regarding vector databases and RAG implementations.
